subject: Make images arm64 compatible
commit_message:
Make images arm64 compatible

Modify kibana and logstash docker images due to arm64 compatibility

Change-Id: Iaf3d636099bd7f8e66e0fd424429f5cfd76b7aa3
Issue-ID: INT-1008
Issue-ID: INT-1009
Signed-off-by: Simon Hrabos <simon.hrabos@tieto.com>

Patch Set 1: Code-Review-2

Hi,
1) the version the elk stack x.x.x should be present in the path
2) the version we want for Dublin 6.6.2
3) it is too late as it should be tested first
4) there is an initiative to move to a common elk stack for all onap project using elk, so this change should come via this initiative.
5) the elasticsearch upgrade is missing (it is in the docker-compose)
